description: settlement slot carries an adapter-originated parse issue so the Munpia group must block before row parsing

files.description: Sanitized settlement rows exist, but adapter-level parse_error must block group parsing.

notes: This fixture locks the contract rule that settlement workbook adapter failures block the Munpia group.
The adapter issue is passed through directly from file.issues.
Rows must remain empty even if parser-ready rows are present in the fixture.
